text:
Reset (, rom. Risetto) is a card exclusive to the physical Greed Island card set.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This card allows one of the G.I. Game Masters to reset all of the card data from a single player target.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.-002 :: 
対象プレイヤー1名のカードデータを全てリセットする
|-
![Eng]
|No.-002 :: Reset 
Reset all card data for one target player.
|}
